antigravity: echo "{{TASK}}" > META_TASK.md && echo "[TURINGCLAW DELEGATION] Awaiting Antigravity IDE intervention... Please resolve the task in META_TASK.md, then create META_DONE.txt to return control to TuringClaw." && while [ ! -f META_DONE.txt ]; do sleep 5; done && rm META_TASK.md META_DONE.txt && echo "IDE Delegation Completed."
